content:
Hello! Yesterday I sent my first patch ever to the kernel. I got an e-mail from Sashiko saying that it have found a high priority issue. The issue is not directly related to my patch, but I'd gladly solve the problem the bot is pointing out.

I checked the usage of ARef::from_raw in other places and I see it being used (1,2). How do I proceed? Do I make the change? If the answer is yes, should I send a v2 of the patch or do it in another patch? (I think another patch would be better since the change is unrelated with the original issue, but I am not sure).

Also, I am planning to send some more #[inline] patches if that's ok
If you want to fix it, please do send out a fix separately.
